scripts.predev: [ "$NODE_ENV" != "ci" ] && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d || echo "skipped predev"
scripts.db:reset: bunx --bun prisma migrate reset && bun db:migrate && bun db:seed
scripts.db:migrate: bunx --bun prisma migrate dev && bunx --bun prisma generate
scripts.docker:publish: docker buildx build --build-arg BUILD_VERSION=$(cat version) --push --platform linux/amd64 -t josiahsayers15/$npm_package_name:latest -t josiahsayers15/$npm_package_name:$(cat version) .
scripts.start: bunx --bun prisma migrate deploy && bun run /usr/src/app/app/index.ts
